    • Method Detail

      • getErrorMessage

        public String getErrorMessage(RecognitionException e)
        Gets a better error message for a recognition exception from the parser. BaseRecognizer.getErrorMessage(RecognitionException, String[]) is used for that.
        Parameters:
        e - the raised exception, not null
        Returns:
        an error message for that exception

      • isAtProofScript
